title: DeleteOntologyResource
description: Delete an ontology resource after confirming a fresh impact preview.

impactToken.description: Fresh signed token returned by the matching impact preview.

reassignChildrenTo.description: Optional glossary or glossary-term target that receives immediate children before deletion.

cascadeConfirmed.description: Explicit confirmation that child concepts may be recursively deleted.

hardDelete.description: Permanently remove the resource instead of soft deleting it.
